content: TASK-035 interrupt done: @archmap/icons v0.1.1 CDN usage was verified and examples/demo.html now imports https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@archmap/icons@0.1.1/+esm. Local devDependency/lockfile are aligned to ^0.1.1, README guidance was updated, and browser verification confirmed GCP/AWS/Datadog/Wiz icon symbols render from the package. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work; consider 3D full icon-grid parity and subgraph overlay parity in 3D if the human asks. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
